# tab-id

Stable per-tab identifier backed by `sessionStorage`, used to attribute crashes
and notifications to the browser tab that produced them. `getTabId()` lazily
mints a `crypto.randomUUID()` on first call, persists it for the tab's lifetime,
and falls back to `"no-tab-id"` if storage is unavailable.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Stable per-tab id (sessionStorage-backed) for crash/notification attribution.
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `crashes`, `debug/crashes`, `notifications`
- Web:
  - Exports: Values: `getTabId`
